dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires 2+ setup conditions with multitimeframe confirmation. Translated to: (1) ADX > 25 to confirm trend establishment, (2) Price vs SMA_20 for directional setup. Exit when setup invalidated (price crosses SMA). Multiframe confirmation approximated through ADX threshold. Context-dependent direction handled via parallel LONG/SHORT rule sets. Hold max set to 5 bars per 'significant movement' requirement.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires 2+ setup conditions with multitimeframe confirmation. Translated to: (1) ADX > 25 to confirm trend establishment, (2) Price vs SMA_20 for directional setup. Exit when setup invalidated (price crosses SMA). Multiframe confirmation approximated through ADX threshold. Context-dependent direction handled via parallel LONG/SHORT rule sets. Hold max set to 5 bars per 'significant movement' requirement.

source_rule_text: A trader should identify and trade only when explicit setup conditions are present, as they improve the probability of significant favorable price movement from entry.
